data.title: Main Street still feels like a recession even as Wall Street breaks records
data.description:
Wall Street just wrapped a record-smashing week. Stocks are riding high, and corporate earnings are beating expectations. Every company tied to anything remotely related to AI is swimming in cash. Analysts are hiking price targets almost every other day. Interest rates, while still high, are easing. But if you talk to anyone on Main Street, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/main-street-still-feels-like-a-recession/

data.title: A whale increased its holdings of HYPE by $3.82 million, with a current profit of $5.47 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, a whale has spent another 3.82 million USDC to increase its HYPE holdings. Currently, it holds 420,379 HYPE (approximately $23.5 million), with a floating profit of $5.47 million.

data.title: LBank has listed XDOG, OKI, EXO, and XRATS
data.description: According to official news, LBank will launch trading of XDOG (XDOG) and Oki Token (OKI) at 6:20 PM (UTC) on September 13, 2025; Exotic Markets (EXO) at 6:50 PM; and XRATS (XRATS) at 7:10 PM. Trading pairs will be available for XDOG/USDT, OKI/USDT, EXO/USDT, and XRATS/USDT. Deposits are currently open, with withdrawals for XDOG and OKI opening at 6:00 PM (UTC) on September 14, and EXO and XRATS at 7:00 PM (UTC) on September 14.

data.title: Zeus Network (ZEUS) is now listed on Binance Alpha. The airdrop starts with 200 Alpha Points.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Zeus Network (ZEUS) is now listed on Binance Alpha. Eligible Binance users can claim a 250-ZEUS token airdrop using 200 Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page. The point threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until all rewards are distributed. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.
